title: Guild API
description: API integration for certain guild features in Wynncraft.
body:
![Example discord -> wynn message](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/vpf2J8XP/images/32248ba8cf9562d31f24fff6f6fbafcd9e97550f.png)

Guild Api is a Wynncraft mod that adds api integration for supported guilds, crowdsourcing data from online mod users and providing helpful utilities.

# Features
- Two way Discord bridging for guild messages
- Commands:
  - ```/tomelist <add|search>```
  - ```/aspectlist <search>```
  - ```/blocklist <add|remove>```
  - Type ```/guildapi help``` in game for a full list
- Panels in the guild members screen to show rewards that are owed

Message pixlze on discord to set up a server for your guild.

![Example info panels](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/vpf2J8XP/images/bf016e997df4ff9319551f0a26adaa768bcbcdb2.png)

![Example tome list](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/vpf2J8XP/images/6a3f554cb9f789c0a177049bd946865c5802cbe1.png)

![Example aspect list](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/vpf2J8XP/images/fe0ce262b882725b62a00429c02ce711620c1217.png)
